plugins.photosPermission: Imprint needs access to your photos so you can attach memories.
plugins.cameraPermission: Imprint needs camera access so you can capture memories.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Imprint uses your location to center the Memory Map and pin your memories.
plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Imprint uses your location in the background to surface nearby Echoes from friends.
